items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 6.3% as index rises
items.summary: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 2.5% from Thursday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.

items.title: Coinbase introduces stock perpetual futures contracts for non-U.S. customers
items.summary: The contracts trade 24/7, are cash-settled in USDC and allow for up to 10-times leverage on single-stock contracts and 20-times on ETF products.

items.title: Iran war volatility is driving oil trading boom on Hyperliquid, says JPMorgan
items.summary: Round-the-clock oil trading on Hyperliquid is drawing investors beyond crypto as geopolitical shocks expose gaps in traditional markets, the bank said.

items.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Rebounds as Oil Falls
items.summary: Crypto bounced as traders bet the Iran war may end sooner than feared, while prediction markets just had a blockbuster day.

items.title: Morgan Stanley files amended S-1 for MSBT Bitcoin ETF
items.summary: Morgan Stanley filed a second amended S-1 for its MSBT spot Bitcoin ETF, detailing seed capital, listing plans and Wall Street partners.

items.title: Coinbase launches 24/7 stock perps for non-US traders
items.summary: Coinbase has launched stock perpetual futures for non-US traders, expanding its push to offer round-the-clock access to multiple asset classes.

items.title: Bitcoin holds steady, with one analyst seeing the upside emerging
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for March 20, 2026

items.title: Apple iOS Malware Targets Crypto Apps on Unpatched iPhones: Google
items.summary: The DarkSword exploit chain affects older versions of iOS 18, delivering malware that specifically hunts for exchange and wallet apps.

items.title: Ripple survey finds 72% of finance leaders see digital assets as essential
items.summary: Stablecoins and custody lead adoption priorities, with firms focusing on how to build or source digital asset infrastructure.

items.title: Crypto market steadies as derivatives signal caution, macro pressure builds
items.summary: BTC holds near $70,500 as derivatives turn defensive, macro risks weigh on sentiment and altcoins show pockets of strength.

items.title: South Korea tax agency seeks private crypto custodian after security lapses
items.summary: South Korea’s tax agency is seeking a private custodian for seized crypto after a wallet seed phrase leak exposed government-held assets.

items.title: Bitcoin vs gold shows potential bottom signals as BTC bulls defend $70K
items.summary: Technical indicators hint at a possible reversal in BTC’s relative performance, as traders watch whether key support levels can hold.

items.title: Bitcoin Rallies to $71K as Bessent Mulls Lifting Some Iran Oil Sanctions
items.summary: Bitcoin bounced Friday as U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent outlined possible responses to soaring oil prices.

items.title: Ripple data reveals stablecoins are becoming the go-to tool for corporate treasury
items.summary: A new Ripple survey of more than 1,000 global finance leaders finds that digital assets are now seen as a strategic necessity rather than an optional experiment.

items.title: Bitcoin’s price action looks dangerously similar to the pattern that sent it crashing to $60,000
items.summary: The recent price action echoes the November–January pattern, showing weak conviction among the “buy the dip” crowd.

items.title: Quantum risk real, but not all crypto wallets equally vulnerable: Galaxy
items.summary: Galaxy Digital’s Will Owens says most crypto wallets aren’t exposed to quantum risks, with vulnerabilities limited to cases where public keys are revealed.

items.title: Super Micro co-founder arrested over alleged $2.5B AI chip smuggling scheme
items.summary: US authorities say they have charged and arrested Supermicro co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw for allegedly funnelling $2.5 billion in AI servers to China through shell companies.

items.title: Gemini sued over post-IPO strategy shift, declining stock price
items.summary: Crypto exchange Gemini is facing a proposed class-action lawsuit over what a complaint alleges is an “abrupt corporate pivot to a prediction-market-centric business model” after its IPO.

items.title: Bitcoin jumps to $70,800 as oil retreats; ether and XRP lag
items.summary: Oil prices slipped as major economies announced joint efforts to stabilize energy markets.

items.title: Appeals court denies Kalshi request to block Nevada enforcement action
items.summary: US gaming lawyer Daniel Wallach says a Nevada state court-issued restraining order against Kalshi appears imminent, preventing it from offering sports-related contracts.

items.title: Morgan Stanley sets MSBT ticker and $1 million seed capital for bitcoin ETF
items.summary: Morgan Stanley has filed to launch a spot Bitcoin ETF with the ticker MSBT and a $1 million seed at debut.

items.title: Kentucky Senate Urged to Strip Hardware Wallet Provision From Crypto Bill
items.summary: A crypto kiosk bill in Kentucky includes language that could effectively outlaw self-custody, drawing industry backlash.

items.title: Major gold trade group releases framework for tokenized gold
items.summary: The World Gold Council says it will develop a platform to connect physical gold to the systems used to issue and manage tokenized gold products.

items.title: Nvidia Deepens Grip on Cloud AI With Major AWS Chip Deal
items.summary: The deal would help scale capacity as AWS builds its own chips, revealing deeper reliance on Nvidia’s stack as usage keeps growing.

items.title: Gemini shares surge 6% after hours on Q4 earnings
items.summary: Gemini reported its fourth quarter revenues were $60.3 million, which co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss say is its highest quarterly revenue in three years.

items.title: FBI warns fake FBI token on Tron is trying to scam users
items.summary: Scammers impersonating the FBI via a token are telling Tron users they are under investigation and must complete a check to avoid having their assets frozen.

items.title: Solana DApps revenue falls to 18-month low as SOL price risks $80 retest
items.summary: Weakening onchain activity and bearish derivatives data suggest that a SOL price recovery will take longer than most investors anticipate.

items.title: Coinbase, Apex Group tokenize Bitcoin Yield Fund on Base
items.summary: Coinbase Asset Management’s Anthony Bassili says the Bitcoin Yield Fund’s tokenized share class checks “identity and eligibility at the token level” for compliance.

items.title: Bitcoin Trails Money Supply Growth as Energy Costs and Rates Bite
items.summary: Higher fuel costs and restrictive financial conditions are absorbing consumer liquidity, helping explain why expanding global money supply has yet to translate into gains for Bitcoin.

items.title: Execution quality is the missing metric in Bitcoin and Ethereum markets
items.summary: Crypto’s hidden trading costs demand the adoption of transaction cost analysis. Slippage, fees and fragmentation erode trust as crypto matures into institutional markets.

items.summary: Bitcoin slipped below $70K as futures selling rose and spot demand cooled, but a recurring setup on lower time frames points to a potential rebound.
